subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Beloved of the world Who hath graciously enabled thee to attain unto His recognition. How numerous are the divines who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد کن محبوب عالم را که ترا بعرفان خود فائز فرمود چه مقدار از علما که خود را
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God
